items.title:
CVE-2026-57872: An unauthenticated
directory traversal vulnerability exists in get_fcont.cgi in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.1
items.description:
An unauthenticated
directory traversal vulnerability exists in get_fcont.cgi in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by
insufficient validation of user-supplied file path input before the requested
file is accessed by the CGI component. A remote attacker may exploit this
vulnerability by sending a crafted request to read arbitrary files accessible
to the affected process, resulting in information disclosure.

// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57872 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-28T10:48:50Z

| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57872", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.title: CVE-2026-40711: Dell Dell Container Storage Modules, version(s) csi-powerstore v2.16.0, csi-unity v2.16.0, csi-powerflex v2.16.0, csi-po
items.description: Dell Dell Container Storage Modules, version(s) csi-powerstore v2.16.0, csi-unity v2.16.0, csi-powerflex v2.16.0, csi-powermax v2.16.0, contain(s) an Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability. A high privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Command execution.

items.title: CVE-2026-48618: A flaw in Node.js TLS hostname handling can cause Node.js unicode dot separator handling can lead to tls wildcard-depth
items.description:
A flaw in Node.js TLS hostname handling can cause Node.js unicode dot separator handling can lead to tls wildcard-depth authentication bypass due to resolver and verifier hostname normalization mismat.

This can lead to confidentiality impact or bypass of the intended security boundary under affected configurations.

This vulnerability affects all supported release lines: **Node.js 22**, **Node.js 24**, and **Node.js 26**.

items.title: CVE-2026-48619: A flaw in Node.js HTTP/2 client allows a server to send an unlimited number of ORIGIN frames, which could lead to an Out
items.description:
A flaw in Node.js HTTP/2 client allows a server to send an unlimited number of ORIGIN frames, which could lead to an Out of Memory error on the client.

This vulnerability affects all supported release lines: **Node.js 22**, **Node.js 24**, and **Node.js 26**.

items.title: CVE-2026-48933: A flaw in Node.js WebCrypto implementation can crash the process if the input of `subtle.encrypt()` is a multiple of 2Gi
items.description:
A flaw in Node.js WebCrypto implementation can crash the process if the input of `subtle.encrypt()` is a multiple of 2GiB.

This vulnerability affects all supported release lines: **Node.js 22**, **Node.js 24**, and **Node.js 26**.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-30041 An integer overflow in the PSD parser compnent of FastStone Image
id: db415bbf-6cdf-591f-80b7-64f7ff566d37
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-30041 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30041
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/28
modified: 2026/06/28
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-30041 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-28T10:48:50Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-30041", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-30041 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9458593; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-28, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 7.5 (High); EPSS score 0.571 (very high exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: PRIORITY PATCH — High severity with confirmed threat activity
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title:
CVE-2026-57878: An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in thttpd in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.
items.description:
An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in thttpd in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by
insufficient bounds checking when processing web request parameters in a
specific request path. A remote attacker may exploit this vulnerability by
sending a crafted HTTP request with overly long input, resulting in memory
corruption, denial of service, or potentially arbitrary code execution.
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] CVE advisory. Risk score 9.8/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 8.0/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1071 (1 technique). 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (25%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

ioc_paywall.message: 1 IOC(s) at 7.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57878 An unauthenticatedstack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exist
id: b324b9ca-a67d-54e8-a546-e36b00d0c6d5
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-57878 (Web Application).

    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:

    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57878

date: 2026/06/28
modified: 2026/06/28
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57878 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-28T10:48:50Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57878", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-57878 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1398155; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-28, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title:
CVE-2026-57880: An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12
items.description:
An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by
insufficient bounds checking when parsing RTSP Digest authentication fields. A
remote attacker may exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted RTSP
request containing overly long authentication data, resulting in memory
corruption, denial of service, or potentially arbitrary code execution.

items.title:
CVE-2026-57879: An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12
items.description:
An unauthenticated
stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision
GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by
insufficient bounds checking when processing RTSP custom authentication data. A
remote attacker may exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted RTSP
request, resulting in memory corruption, denial of service, or potentially
arbitrary code execution.
